data.title: Tangentia adds AI agent to EDI platform to automate error handling
data.description: The company said pilot customers saw trading partner onboarding times cut by as much as 50%.

data.title: Ambev inks deal to use AB InBev’s BEES B2B commerce platform
data.description: BEES is owned by an AB InBev-controlled entity and has been rolled out globally as the brewer’s primary B2B commerce engine.

data.title: Starbucks taps Amazon grocery technology leader as CTO
data.description: Anand Varadarajan will join Starbucks’ executive leadership team and lead the company’s global technology organization.

data.title: Bain: Agentic AI could account for 25% of U.S. ecommerce by 2030
data.description: The firm cites Salesforce figures estimating that AI and autonomous agents influenced about $3 billion in U.S. Black Friday sales, signaling early commercial impact even as most purchases remain consumer directed.

data.title: Fastenal names new CEO, signals continuity in ecommerce
data.description: The leadership change comes as Fastenal continues to emphasize customer-facing technology, inventory management systems and digitally enabled supply chain services.
